case_title: GOMEZ, ERNESTO VS C& C OF SF MUNI RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,180.36 FILED BY GOMEZ, ERNESTO AS TO DEFENDANT C& C OF SF MUNI RAILWAY ALLAN, GREGORY # 3117 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
